title: Every SaaS will be free within 3 years. Here's why
post:
Mark my words: the majority of SaaS products will be free within three years.

Not free tier — actually free. No credit card required, no feature paywall, no "contact sales."

Why? Because AI makes the marginal cost of serving each user approach zero. When it costs you $0.01 per month to serve a user, you can't justify charging $99. The competitive pressure will crush prices.

We're already seeing it. The AI writing tools that charged $20/month are now free or $5/month. Image generators went from $0.20 per image to essentially free in 18 months.

The winners won't be the companies with the best pricing model. They'll be the ones who figure out how to monetize when the product is free.

Spoiler: it won't be subscriptions.

What's your take on SaaS pricing evolution? Thoughts?
